mapper.select: SELECT tnf.fbill_no, tnf.fdocument_status, su.user_name as fapprover_id, tnf.fapprove_date, sys.user_name as fmodifier_id, tnf.fcreate_date, sysu.user_name as fcreator_id, tnf.fmodify_date, tnf.fcancel_date, tnf.fcanceler, tnf.fbill_type_id, tnf.fbusiness_type, tnf.fdate, bym.number as fmaterial_id, tnf.fmaterial_name, tnf.fmaterial_model, byd.name as funit_id, bydy.name as fbase_unit_id, tnf.finspect_qty, tnf.fqualified_qty, tnf.funqualified_qty, tnf.finspect_result, tnf.fqc_status, super.name as fsupplier_id, tnf.fstock_id, tnf.flot, tnf.fzxs, tnf.fmz, tnf.fjz, tnf.fchang, tnf.fkuan, tnf.fgao, tnf.fzxshu, tnf.ftj, tnf.fdiscount_qty, tnf.fmzh, tnf.fbzyq, tnf.ftsyq, tnf.fcptp, tnf.fxsddh, tnf.fcgddh, tnf.fkhjc, tnf.f_cty_picture, tnf.f_cty_picture1, tnf.f_peuu_attachment_ca9, tnf.fnhc, tnf.fnhk, tnf.fnhg FROM receipt_notice_full tnf LEFT JOIN sys_user su on tnf.fapprover_id=su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sys on tnf.fmodifier_id=sys.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user sysu on tnf.fcreator_id=sysu.k3_key LEFT JOIN supplier super on tnf.fsupplier_id=super.supplierid LEFT JOIN by_material bym on tnf.fmaterial_id=bym.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd on tnf.funit_id=byd.kingdee and byd.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy on tnf.fbase_unit_id=byd.kingdee and bydy.category='unit' FROM receipt_notice_full WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO receipt_notice_full ( fbill_no, fdocument_status, fapprover_id, fapprove_date, fmodifier_id, fcreate_date, fcreator_id, fmodify_date, fcancel_date, fcanceler, fbill_type_id, fbusiness_type, fdate, fmaterial_id, fmaterial_name, fmaterial_model, fqc_scheme_id, funit_id, fbase_unit_id, finspect_qty, fqualified_qty, funqualified_qty, finspect_result, fqc_status, fsupplier_id, fstock_id, flot, fzxs, fmz, fjz, fchang, fkuan, fgao, fzxshu, ftj, fdiscount_qty, fmzh, fbzyq, ftsyq, fcptp, fxsddh, fcgddh, fkhjc, f_cty_picture, f_cty_picture1, f_peuu_attachment_ca9, fnhc, fnhk, fnhg ) VALUES ( #{fBillNo}, #{fDocumentStatus}, #{fApproverId}, #{fApproveDate}, #{fModifierId}, #{fCreateDate}, #{fCreatorId}, #{fModifyDate}, #{fCancelDate}, #{fCanceler}, #{fBillTypeId}, #{fBusinessType}, #{fDate}, #{fMaterialId}, #{fMaterialName}, #{fMaterialModel}, #{fQcSchemeId}, #{fUnitId}, #{fBaseUnitId}, #{fInspectQty}, #{fQualifiedQty}, #{fUnqualifiedQty}, #{fInspectResult}, #{fQcStatus}, #{fSupplierId}, #{fStockId}, #{fLot}, #{fzxs}, #{fmz}, #{fjz}, #{fChang}, #{fKuan}, #{fGao}, #{fZxshu}, #{fTj}, #{fDiscountQty}, #{fMzh}, #{fbzyq}, #{fTsyq}, #{fcptp}, #{fXsddh}, #{fCgddh}, #{fKhjc}, #{fCtyPicture}, #{fCtyPicture1}, #{fPeuuAttachmentCa9}, #{fnhc}, #{fnhk}, #{fnhg} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE receipt_notice_full
fbill_no = #{fBillNo},
fdocument_status = #{fDocumentStatus},
fapprover_id = #{fApproverId},
fapprove_date = #{fApproveDate},
fmodifier_id = #{fModifierId},
fmodify_date = #{fModifyDate},
fcancel_date = #{fCancelDate},
fcanceler = #{fCanceler},
fbill_type_id = #{fBillTypeId},
fbusiness_type = #{fBusinessType},
fdate = #{fDate},
fmodifier_id = #{fModifierId}, fmodify_date = #{fModifyDate}
WHERE fid = #{fid}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM receipt_notice_full WHERE fid IN
#{id}
